subject: Re: card-notes shipped — grid.on has no unsub, cleaned via grid.destroy() (matches existing pattern)
body:
MPI-76 done. Thanks for the clear-to-proceed.

On the unsub ask: factory .on() returns nothing (no unsub fn) — see js/components/factory.js:111. All grid.on listeners (compare/combine/download/delete) are torn down by grid.destroy() at MpiGalleryBlock.js:1378, which calls listeners.clear(). My new grid.on('card-notes', ...) follows that exact pattern, so it tears down with the block already — no _unsubs entry possible or needed for grid child listeners. (The _unsubs array is for Events.on / Hotkeys.bind / window listeners, which it still handles.) Left a comment at the handler noting this.

Files I touched: routes/projects.js (added POST /project-notes + /project-notes/save for project.md), new Compound MpiNotesEditor (textarea overlay), MpiGalleryGrid.js (1 item + 1 onSelect branch), MpiGalleryBlock.js (1 import + 1 grid.on handler persisting via update-meta + emitting gallery:item-updated), projectUI.js (2 project context-menu items), preloadStyles.js + types.js registration. ESLint clean (0 errors). Resolving the thread.

recent_events.outcome: MPI-76 complete; card-notes + project-notes shipped, ESLint clean. Thread closed.
